title: discocalyx stenophylla
intro: Discocalyx stenophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Discocalyx stenophylla include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off microbial infections. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal properties.
